emptyState.title: No documents found
emptyState.description: Upload documents to start building your knowledge base.

confirmDelete: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.

editDialog.title: Edit Document
editDialog.departmentsHint: Select which departments can access this document. Leave empty for global access.
editDialog.visibilityGlobalWarning: Document content will be compiled into the shared wiki and visible to all employees — including those without access to the original file. Only use Global if the content is not sensitive.
editDialog.confirmDeptChange: Changing department will re-run the AI analysis. Existing wiki pages will be updated to the new department. Continue?

planReviewDialog.title: Review Compilation Plan
planReviewDialog.subtitle: {sourceTitle} — approve to start writing wiki pages, or reject to stop.
planReviewDialog.pagesToCreate: {count, plural, =1 {1 page} other {# pages}} to create
planReviewDialog.pagesToUpdate: {count, plural, =1 {1 page} other {# pages}} to update
planReviewDialog.feedbackPlaceholder: Feedback or correction for the AI (e.g. 'Page X already exists, it should be UPDATE not CREATE'). Required to regenerate.
planReviewDialog.feedbackHint: Write feedback then click Regenerate to have AI redo the plan, or click Approve to proceed as-is.
planReviewDialog.regenerating: Regenerating plan with your feedback… this can take 30–90 seconds.
planReviewDialog.regeneratingLong: Regenerating plan with your feedback — this can take up to a minute.
planReviewDialog.feedbackRequired: Please describe what should be changed before regenerating.
